indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural lighting
indicators.rationale: Natural lighting can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: No clutter
indicators.rationale: A clean and uncluttered space can enhance focus and productivity.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture may make it difficult to find a comfortable and ergonomic seating position.

reasoning_summary: The space is suitable for computer work due to its large open area, natural lighting, and lack of clutter. However, the absence of furniture could be a drawback for prolonged use.
